critical_findings.failure_mode: [S2] Fixture/objective values can diverge from observability metrics in reviewed scenarios.
critical_findings.impact: Trust-boundary consistency checks are underrepresented in chaos tests.
critical_findings.minimal_fix: Ensure builder keeps objective observed values and aggregate budget fields synchronized.

critical_findings.failure_mode: [S3] Invalid budget status mapping can yield semantically ambiguous status labeling.
critical_findings.impact: Outputs remain fail-closed but diagnostics can mislead operators.
critical_findings.minimal_fix: Clarify/normalize invalid-state status mapping and assert expected labels in tests.

required_fixes.description: Repair replay builder alignment so chaos fixtures preserve internal consistency.
Add tests for invalid-budget status labeling to prevent ambiguity drift.

watch_items: Keep eval CI gate exit semantics aligned with control decision reasons.
failure_mode_summary: Surgical review reported concerns; runtime logic is mostly sound but fixture consistency and status semantics need correction.
